Petition For Order Confirming Successor Co-Trustees And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that the 850 petition had previously been on calendar for the following dates: 6/3/13, 6/24/13, 7/15/13, and 7/29/13 with no response to the 5/29/13 Probate Examiner's notes. The Court ordered the matter off calendar without prejudice and will issue an order taking the matter off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Barrientos/T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
